description:
Financial crimes detectives seized a cloud storage sync folder from a suspect. The suspect claims it only contains normal system configuration files, but intelligence suggests the suspect runs an illicit digital media storefront and hid the transactional database within this folder by changing its extension. Create a forensic case named 'Financial_Triage_2024' (case number 'INV-FIN-009') using the logical directory /home/ga/evidence/logical_seizure/ as the data source. Identify the SQLite database hidden with a .sys extension and analyze its contents to find all transactions for the customer 'Leonie Köhler'.

Export a pipe-delimited CSV report to /home/ga/Reports/suspect_transactions.csv with the header InvoiceId|InvoiceDate|BillingCity|Total for all of Leonie's invoices. Additionally, generate a summary file at /home/ga/Reports/financial_summary.txt containing the following labeled lines: CUSTOMER_NAME, CUSTOMER_ID, TOTAL_INVOICES, LIFETIME_SPEND, and DATABASE_FILE_FOUND.
